title: Card Name
Ruling
Description
table-363-363.caption: What is the description about the ruling of card "Condemn"?
data: The amount of life the controller gains is equal to the creature's toughness as it last existed on the battlefield.
The effect is a replacement effect.
In Commander, if your commander is put into the library this way, you can choose to put it into the command zone instead.
If multiple creatures are attacking, you can choose which one to target with Condemn.
